sections.paragraph:
πυρέσσω (s. next entry; Eur., Hippocr. et al.; Epict. [s. index Sch.]; M. Ant. 8, 15; Diog. L. 6, 1, 6; Jos., Vi. 404; POslo 95, 20 [96 a.d.]; 152, 4) suffer with a fever Mt 8:14; Mk 1:30.—DELG s.v. πύρ. M-M. TW.

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

  1. Ant. M. Ant. = Marcus Aurelius Antoninus, II a.d.—List 5

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

POslo POslo = Papyri Osloenses—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 899
